name: # Kolabi XBT direct market agitator strategy:
# SCENARIO <name>: Given <time/gate>; When <market pulse fires>; Then immediately send an opposite market tail for the played quantity.
# Purpose: push Kraken demo liquidity without leaving reduce-only trigger tails fighting the account's net position.
# Design note: the grammar requires a tail, so these rows use tType=M with no reduce-only flag. The tail should flatten the pair as soon as the head fill is seen.
# Demo-book rule of thumb from observation: around 200 contracts can move one visible level, about 7 USD; 401 can move around two levels; 1401 can sweep much deeper.
# Run with the adversarial account:
# set -a; . ./.env.postgres; set +a

# python -m kolabi.bot run --strategy orders/advers_direct.tsv --account-scope advers --api-key-env KRAKEN_FUTURE_DEMO2_API_KEY --api-secret-env KRAKEN_FUTURE_DEMO2_API_SECRET --max-active-pairs 1 2>&1 | tee logs/advers_direct.log
# name
# Given the run starts; When active; Then buy 401 twice with 30s pause, each pulse immediately flattened by a sell market tail.
ADIR_BUY_401_X2
# Given last/reference moved up by at least 10 USD since activation; When crossed; Then buy 1401 once and immediately flatten with a sell market tail.
ADIR_BUY_1401_GATE
# Given the run has been active for 3 minutes; When active; Then sell 401 twice with 30s pause, each pulse immediately flattened by a buy market tail.
ADIR_SELL_401_X2
# Given last/reference moved down by at least 10 USD after this row activates; When crossed; Then sell 1401 once and immediately flatten with a buy market tail.
ADIR_SELL_1401_GATE
# --- Manual one-shot rows: uncomment only one at a time for clean book impact measurement. ---
# Given the row is uncommented; When active; Then buy about one visible level and immediately flatten.
#ADIR_BUY_201_ONESHOT
# Given the row is uncommented; When active; Then buy about four visible levels and immediately flatten.
#ADIR_BUY_801_ONESHOT
# Given the row is uncommented; When active; Then sell about one visible level and immediately flatten.
#ADIR_SELL_201_ONESHOT
# Given the row is uncommented; When active; Then sell about four visible levels and immediately flatten.
#ADIR_SELL_801_ONESHOT
